---
output: 
  html_document:
    css: custom_styles.css
---
#### Day 3 Goals
<b>Goals for Day 3: </b><br>
<img src = "./images/poor_management.png" alt = 'Poor file management illustration' style = "float:right; width:400px;">
<span class = "capright"><a href="https://allisonhorst.com">Artwork by @allison_horst</a></span>

Data Visualization:  
<ul>
<li>Data visualization best practices</li>
<li>Understanding the building blocks of ggplot2 plotting package</li>
<li>Custom colors and shapes by grouping variables</li>
<li>Customizing axes</li>
<li>Combining plots with facets and patchwork</li>
<li>Working with legends</li>
<li>Color palettes</li>
</ul>
Coding best practices:
<ul>
<li>Commenting code</li>
<li>Putting packages, datasets, and parameters on top of script</li>
<li>Using consistent coding style</li>
<li>Logical object naming</li>
<li>Using projects instead of stand alone scripts where possible</li>
<li>How to choose R packages</li>
</ul>

<br>
<b>Feedback: </b>Please leave feedback in the training feedback form. You can submit feedback multiple times and don't need to answer every question. Responses are anonymous.
<br>
<br>

</details>
<br>
